search_query: disability benefits for adults with adhd
combined_text: Can an Adult With Attention Deficit Disorder Get Social Security Disability? While Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder, or ADHD (sometimes referred to as Attention Deficit Disorder, or ADD), is a mental health condition that is most often associated with children, adults can suffer from ADHD, and it can interfere with their ability to work.
